description:
## Step 2 — Verify GL Accounts

Wallet Settings needs four GL accounts to post Journal Entries correctly:

| Account | Used For |
|---|---|
| **Customer Wallet Liability** (Liability) | Holds the company's obligation to customers |
| **Default Bank Account** (Asset) | Bank/Cash side of every top-up |
| **Deferred Revenue** (Liability or Income) | Credited when funds are spent on a booking, before delivery |
| **Commission Expense** (Expense) | Booking commissions paid to employees |

The app tries to auto-create *Customer Wallet Liability* under Current Liabilities. If your CoA is non-standard, create it manually and pick it here.

**The accounting cycle this enables:**
```
Deposit:    Dr. Bank             Cr. Customer Wallet Liability
Withdrawal: Dr. Wallet Liability Cr. Deferred Revenue
Delivery:   Dr. Deferred Revenue Cr. Booking Revenue (net of commission)
```
name: Verify GL Accounts
title: Verify GL Accounts
